summary: Completed e2e testing of DOMMMA Iteration 26 features: Landlord Earnings Dashboard, AI Property Search Chatbot, Tenant Credit Check, AI Features (Property Valuation, Smart Rent Pricing, Neighborhood Comparison), Payment History, Multi-language support, and Browse page tabs. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All tested features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user test@dommma.com / test123
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 26 features are working: 1) GET /api/landlord/earnings returns summary with net_income, vacancy_rate, roi_percentage, 2) POST /api/ai/property-chat returns session_id, response, listings with AI-powered responses, 3) POST /api/credit-check/request returns credit_score, risk_level, recommendation (MOCKED - simulated scores), 4) GET /api/credit-check/reports returns array of reports, 5) GET /api/ai/chat-history returns messages array, 6) POST /api/ai/property-valuation returns estimated_rent, 7) POST /api/ai/smart-rent-pricing returns suggested_rent, 8) GET /api/ai/neighborhood-comparison returns neighborhoods array, 9) Frontend pages all render correctly: /earnings (Earnings Dashboard), /property-search (AI Chatbot), /credit-check, /property-valuation, /neighborhood-compare, /payment-history, 10) Browse page has Rent/Buy/Lease Takeover tabs, 11) Language toggle shows EN/FR/中文 dropdown, 12) Main navbar has 'AI Search' link to /property-search. Credit check scoring is MOCKED for demo purposes.
